name: web_search
description: Search the web using Brave Search. Returns titles, URLs, and descriptions. Requires BRAVE_API_KEY environment variable.

count.description: Number of results to return (1-10). Default: 5.

country.description: 2-letter country code for region-specific results (e.g. 'US', 'CN', 'DE'). Default: 'US'.

date_after.description: Only results published after this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

date_before.description: Only results published before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).
